mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pq_answer ( source_system, questionnaire_id, product_id, answer_time, rom_version, app_version, feedback_text, score_reason, recommend_score, user_category, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.sourceSystem}, #{item.questionnaireId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.answerTime}, #{item.romVersion}, #{item.appVersion}, #{item.feedbackText}, #{item.scoreReason}, #{item.recommendScore}, #{item.userCategory}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_id = VALUES(product_id), answer_time = VALUES(answer_time), rom_version = VALUES(rom_version), app_version = VALUES(app_version), feedback_text = VALUES(feedback_text), score_reason = VALUES(score_reason), recommend_score = VALUES(recommend_score), user_category = VALUES(user_category), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
